query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.cobertizo_id,
  p.localizacion,
  p.producto,
  a.cliente as anuncio_cliente
FROM paradas p
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT a1.*
  FROM anuncios a1
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT parada_id, MAX(id) as max_id
    FROM anuncios
    WHERE estado IN ('Activo', 'Programado')
    AND fecha_fin >= CURDATE()
    GROUP BY parada_id
  ) a2 ON a1.parada_id = a2.parada_id AND a1.id = a2.max_id
) a ON p.id = a.parada_id
WHERE LOWER(TRIM(a.cliente)) = 'bluey'
LIMIT 20;
